description: Kate's qualification envelope — fields extracted from the voice transcript and written into the `leads` table. Freeze in hour 1; every downstream consumer (Otto, cockpit, Twin schema) depends on this.

fields.label: Homologation gate
fields.note: Derived from Kate's Step 1 gate. `true` = per-unit residential or small shared kitchen. `false` = central cafeteria / industrial laundry → Kate ends the call as `homologation_fail`.
fields.extract_prompt: Based on the call, is this deployment household-typical (per-unit residential OR small shared kitchen serving up to 12 residents)? Return true/false.

fields.label: Facility type
fields.extract_prompt: What type of facility is this? Senior care home, assisted living, dementia ward, student housing, serviced apartments, hospital, or other residential?

fields.label: Number of residential units
fields.extract_prompt: How many residential units, rooms, or apartments are we talking about? Should equal or approximate the sum of bundle quantities.

fields.label: Decision / installation timeline
fields.extract_prompt: When does the facility need the appliances in place?

fields.label: Preferred rental term
fields.extract_prompt: What rental term did the prospect prefer? Default 60 months if unspecified.

fields.label: Decision maker name and role
fields.extract_prompt: Who will ultimately sign off on this purchase? Name and role.

fields.label: Leader units (Good)
fields.extract_prompt: How many Leader-package units did the prospect want? 0 if none.

fields.label: Profi units (Better)
fields.extract_prompt: How many Profi-package units did the prospect want? 0 if none.

fields.label: Top Feature units (Best)
fields.extract_prompt: How many Top Feature package units did the prospect want? 0 if none.

fields.label: Opt-in for proposal
fields.extract_prompt: Did the prospect opt in to receive the tailored proposal? true / false.

fields.label: Preferred delivery channel
fields.extract_prompt: Which channel did the prospect pick for the proposal — email, whatsapp, or phone? Null if not asked.

fields.label: Contact address (email / whatsapp number)
fields.extract_prompt: If opt_in is true: the email address or WhatsApp number where Otto should send the offer.

fields.label: Free-text notes
fields.extract_prompt: Anything else worth noting — mentioned competitors, existing suppliers, timing caveats, etc.

fields.label: Escalation reason
fields.extract_prompt: If the call should be escalated to a human colleague, why? Null if no escalation.

note: Completeness = filled_required_fields / total_required_fields. Otto requires >= 0.7 to generate the proposal. Bundle quantities may be zero but must all be present.
